title: crystalcombat
description: The perfect PvP modpack for 1.21.1 all mods are allowed on mctiers.com
body:
The Best PvP ModPack for CrystalPvP, good Fps and the Theobald practice Bot installed!                      
This modpack contains mods to increase performance as well as a few nice-to-have-features such as Marlowws crystal Optimizer, rebinALlKeys, Full Bright CarpetPvP, Axium and many more which makes it the perfect 1.21.1 Pvp modpack.
All mods on this modpack are allowed on McTiers.com and on the most minecraft servers like vanillaplus, donutsmp, pvphub, pvpclub, and more.
https://youtu.be/91cDpeFDPIE




The Mods in this mod pack are: 
AppleSkin, CoordinatenHud, Axiom, BetterHurtCam, Bobby, PvPCarpet, CookeyMod, Crosshair Indicator, Custom Block Highlighter, Custom Crosshair Mod, Coustom FOV, Dynamic FPS, Enhanced Block Entities, EntityCulling, Exordium, Fabricshot, Fadeless, Fast Items, FerriteCore, Freelook, Gamma Utils, GPU Tape, HerosAnchorOptimizer, HitBox+, Ingameaccoutswitcher, InventoryHUD, Iris, JoinAutoSprint, Lithium, MarlowwwsCrystalOptimizer, ModMenu, ModernFix, MultidisplayFix, NoDeathAnimation, NoResourcePackWarnigs, Nvidium, PerspectiveNametag, RebindAllTheKeys, ReflexAntiLag, ReplayMod, ShulkerBoxTooltip, SimpleVoiceChat, Sodium, SoundsBeGone, Tiers, Totem Tweaks, TotemCounter, VeryManyPlayers, ViaFabricPlus, VideoTape, WalksyShielt Fix, Walksy Crosshair Addons, Walksy Custom Hitboxes, and WIZooms
